context: Tests whether the agent adds correct ARIA roles and attributes to the navigation bar, implements full keyboard navigation following the ARIA menu pattern, properly manages the close timer to prevent panel flicker, and opens the panel on focus.

checklist.name: nav aria-label
checklist.description: The <nav> element has aria-label="Main navigation" (or equivalent descriptive label)

checklist.name: aria-haspopup on trigger
checklist.description: Top-level anchors with an associated mega panel have aria-haspopup="true"

checklist.name: aria-expanded state
checklist.description: Top-level anchors with an associated mega panel have aria-expanded set to "true" when the panel is open and "false" (or omitted) when closed

checklist.name: Open on focus
checklist.description: The onFocus handler on top-level anchors opens the corresponding mega panel (same as hover)

checklist.name: ArrowDown opens panel
checklist.description: Pressing ArrowDown (or Enter or Space) on a top-level item with a megaMenu opens the panel and moves focus to the first link inside it

checklist.name: ArrowRight/Left between items
checklist.description: Pressing ArrowRight moves focus to the next top-level item; pressing ArrowLeft moves focus to the previous one (wrapping around)

checklist.name: Escape closes panel
checklist.description: Pressing Escape while a panel is open closes it (sets activeItem to null)

checklist.name: 150ms close delay
checklist.description: The onMouseLeave handler uses a setTimeout of 150ms (or a value in the 150-200ms range) rather than immediately closing the panel

checklist.name: Cancel close on panel enter
checklist.description: Entering the mega panel (onMouseEnter on the panel) cancels the pending close timer so the panel stays open
